profile.title: My profile
profile.themeHint: "System" follows your OS preference and toggles automatically between light and dark.
profile.passwordTooShort: The new password must be at least 8 characters.
profile.passwordError: Error: current password incorrect or new value invalid.
profile.emailReadOnly: The email address cannot be changed here.

profilePage.eventAssigned: A work order is assigned to me
profilePage.pushPermissionDenied: Permission denied by the browser — allow notifications then try again.
profilePage.pushServerDisabled: The server has no VAPID keys configured — contact the administrator.
profilePage.pushUnsupported: This browser does not support push notifications.
profilePage.notifPrefsLoadError: Unable to load preferences. Try again later.
profilePage.notifPrefsIntro: The "In-app" option controls the bell in the top right. Email depends on the server SMTP configuration. The "Push" channel requires you to enable push notifications below.
profilePage.pushStateDenied: Blocked by the browser — allow notifications in the site settings.
profilePage.pushStateDefault: Not enabled yet. Click "Enable" to receive notifications even when the tab is closed.
profilePage.pushStateUnsubscribed: Permission granted but not enabled. Click "Enable".
profilePage.pushChannelHint: Enable push notifications above to use this channel
profilePage.updateFailed: Update failed — the checkbox reverted to its previous state.
profilePage.gpsDescription: By enabling this tracking, your GPS position is sent to the dispatcher while you are logged in. Data is kept for 7 days then automatically deleted (Law 25 / PIPEDA). You can disable tracking at any time.
profilePage.gpsShareLabel: Share my location with the dispatcher
profilePage.totpEnabledToast: 2FA enabled — future logins will require a code.
profilePage.totpIntro: Add a second authentication factor via an app like Google Authenticator, Authy, 1Password or Bitwarden. Blocks 99% of account takeovers.
profilePage.totpStep1: 1. Scan this QR code in your authenticator app:
profilePage.totpBackupCodesWarning: Backup codes — save them now, they will never be shown again
profilePage.totpStep2: 2. Enter the 6-digit code generated by your app:
profilePage.totpActiveInfo: 2FA enabled. A code will be required at each login.
profilePage.totpDisableConfirmPrompt: Confirm with your password + a TOTP code (or a backup code):
profilePage.totpCodePlaceholder: TOTP code (6 digits) or backup code
